Module com.example.escriturarapida
Package com.example.escriturarapida.model

Interface IGame

All Known Implementing Classes:
GameModel
public interface IGame
Interface representing the game state and logic. Classes implementing this interface manage levels, correct words, and streaks.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    addCorrectWord()
    Adds a correct word to the current count and updates streaks accordingly.
    int
    getCorrectWords()
    Returns the number of correct words typed by the player.
    int
    getCurrentStreak()
    Returns the current streak of correct words.
    int
    getLevel()
    Returns the current level of the player.
    int
    getWordsToLevelUp()
    Returns the number of words required to level up.
    void
    levelUp()
    Increases the player's level by one.
    void
    resetCorrectWords()
    Resets the counter of correct words.

  • Method Details

    • getLevel

      int getLevel()
      Returns the current level of the player.
      Returns:
      current level

    • getCorrectWords

      int getCorrectWords()
      Returns the number of correct words typed by the player.
      Returns:
      number of correct words

    • addCorrectWord

      void addCorrectWord()
      Adds a correct word to the current count and updates streaks accordingly.

    • resetCorrectWords

      void resetCorrectWords()
      Resets the counter of correct words.

    • getWordsToLevelUp

      int getWordsToLevelUp()
      Returns the number of words required to level up.
      Returns:
      words needed to reach next level

    • levelUp

      void levelUp()
      Increases the player's level by one.

    • getCurrentStreak

      int getCurrentStreak()
      Returns the current streak of correct words.
      Returns:
